chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-6165/2024 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 13.01.2025 Mr. Iddrees Alvi advocate for petitioner. Pir Riaz Muhammad Shah, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Jan Muhammad Khuro, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. SIP Imran Saad, SHO, PS Baldia................ Report filed by police official present, is taken on record. Counsel does not press this petition as detenue has returned home. Petition is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E IK
